title: Piel en Armonia | Medical dermatology in Quito
description: Precision dermatology in Quito with clear diagnosis, tailored medical treatment, and follow-up you can trust.

slides.title: Your skin deserves precise reading from day one.
slides.description: Before treatment starts, we listen to your history and examine skin, hair, and nails in full context.

slides.title: Medical technology that serves your outcome.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are used only when they add clinical value and safe follow-up.

slides.title: Remote to guide. In clinic to confirm.
slides.description: Telemedicine speeds decisions and defines when in-clinic evaluation in Quito is the right next step.

slides.title: Follow-up turns progress into lasting results.
slides.description: Each review compares evolution, adjusts the plan, and keeps medical decisions traceable.

slides.title: A team that explains, cares, and follows through.
slides.description: You receive contemporary dermatology criteria and clear communication at every treatment stage.

newsStrip.label: Schedule and updates
newsStrip.headline: Online booking is temporarily under maintenance; telemedicine and clinical routes remain active so continuity is not lost.

editorial.title: Less noise. Better clarity for your next decision.
editorial.deck: Every block answers three essentials: what is happening, what we will do, and what comes next.

cards.title: From first consultation to full plan
cards.copy: When your skin changes quickly, we start with comprehensive diagnosis and stage-based treatment goals.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea with sustained control
cards.copy: We treat active inflammation and prevent relapse with timely adjustments, not repetitive one-size plans.

cards.title: Laser with traceable medical parameters
cards.copy: Energy and frequency are chosen by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance to protect your skin.

cards.title: Telemedicine when timing matters most
cards.copy: You receive early guidance and, when needed, priority escalation to in-clinic consultation.

cards.title: Pediatric care families can understand
cards.copy: Each medical decision is translated into practical routines for home and school.

cards.title: Follow-up that proves real progress
cards.copy: We compare images and symptoms between visits to keep your treatment accurate over time.

corporateMatrix.title: Medical units designed for real cases
corporateMatrix.deck: Each card states who it fits, how it works, and the most useful next step.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
cards.copy: Full first-reading route to define priorities, risk profile, and follow-up timing.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea program
cards.copy: Phase-based strategy to control flares, calm sensitive skin, and reduce visible relapses.

cards.title: Dermatology laser platform
cards.copy: Laser platform indicated by phototype and objective, with response control at every session.

cards.title: Early reading of high-risk lesions
cards.copy: Early lesion review for changing spots so action is timely and clinically grounded.

cards.title: Remote triage and continuity
cards.copy: Remote orientation to decide whether online continuity or in-clinic escalation is needed in Quito.

cards.title: Medical dermoaesthetic support
cards.copy: Medical dermoaesthetic support with realistic timelines and supervised protocol decisions.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: Web scheduling returns soon. Until then, you can start through services or request first guidance via telemedicine.
